description: Benchmark test queries with ground truth rankings for evaluating recommendation systems

queries.query_text: stiff carving ski

ground_truth_top5.reason: Stiffest ski in dataset (10), elite edge grip, pure on-piste
Race slalom, stiffness 9, edge grip 10, pure carving
Expert carving category, stiffness 8, edge grip 9
Expert carver, stiffness 8, edge grip 9, 72mm waist
Advanced frontside, stiffness 7, edge grip 8, camber

queries.query_text: soft beginner ski

ground_truth_top5.reason: True beginner ski, softest flex (2), max forgiveness (10)
Soft flex (5) and forgiving (6), though freestyle-oriented

queries.query_text: powder ski with good float

ground_truth_top5.reason: Widest ski (112mm), powder float 10, full rocker, dedicated powder
Powder freeride, float 8, 108mm, playful in deep snow

queries.query_text: playful freestyle ski for the park

ground_truth_top5.reason: Freestyle freeride, playfulness 9, park terrain, twin tip
All-mountain freeride, playfulness 8, park terrain, very fun
Powder freeride, playfulness 8, but not park-focused
Powder freeride, playfulness 8, good for tricks

queries.query_text: damp stable all-mountain ski

ground_truth_top5.reason: Mantra M6, dampness 9, stability 9, all-mountain expert

queries.query_text: stiff, damp, on-piste ski available in 180cm or longer
lightweight freeride ski with good playfulness and powder float

ground_truth_top5.reason: Carbon/flax keeps weight down (1900g), playfulness 7, float 8

queries.query_text: titanal construction ski with edge grip for hardpack and at least 95mm waist

ground_truth_top5.reason: Titanal sandwich, edge grip 8, 96mm waist, hardpack specialist

queries.query_text: versatile one-ski quiver around 96-100mm waist for mixed conditions

ground_truth_top5.reason: 102mm waist, slightly wider than ideal but versatile

queries.query_text: expert carving ski with dampness above 7 and full camber profile
all-mountain ski with no rocker, under 90mm waist

ground_truth_top5.reason: 88mm waist, camber with tip rocker (partial but mainly camber), all-mountain
90mm waist (borderline), camber with tip rocker, all-mountain frontside
82mm waist, camber with tip rocker, all-mountain capability in terrain list
76mm waist, pure camber, but more frontside than all-mountain
96mm waist (over 90) but camber with tip rocker, strong all-mountain

queries.query_text: freeride ski that is NOT playful, stiff with high stability, over 105mm waist

ground_truth_top5.reason: Big mountain, stiffness 8, stability 9, playfulness 4, 106mm waist
Freeride, stiffness 7, stability 7, but playfulness 8 (too playful)
Freeride, 106mm, but stiffness only 6 and playfulness 7

queries.query_text: ski for advanced intermediate that's forgiving but not a beginner ski, 80-95mm waist, available in 170-175cm
the lightest ski that still has good edge grip and stability for groomed runs

ground_truth_top5.reason: 1350g very light, but edge grip only 5 and stability 3
1550g moderate, edge grip 8, stability 7 — best balance
1580g moderate, edge grip 8, stability 8 — excellent balance
1650g moderate, edge grip 7, stability 6 — decent balance

queries.query_text: ski that handles both powder and hardpack equally well, not a specialist in either

ground_truth_top5.reason: Float 6, edge grip 7 — most balanced between powder and hardpack
Float 5, edge grip 7 — balanced at a lower performance level
Float 8, edge grip 6 — slightly powder-biased but still versatile

queries.query_text: a ski that feels alive underfoot
queries.notes: Reviews for SKI-013 (Moment Wildcat) explicitly use the phrase 'feels alive underfoot'. Other lively skis include the Line Blade and playful options.

ground_truth_top5.reason: Reviewer literally says 'feels alive underfoot', maple core described as springy and engaging
Maple core described as lively and snappy, engaging carving feel
Reviews emphasize fun and lively feel
Poppy, energetic feel from ash/poplar core

queries.query_text: good ski for the ice coast
queries.notes: Ice coast = US East Coast, known for hard-packed icy conditions. Needs strong edge grip and dampness.

ground_truth_top5.reason: Reviewer explicitly mentions 'East Coast hardpack and ice', damp 9, edge grip 9
Reviewer calls it 'king' on East Coast, edge grip 8, damp 8
Reviewer mentions 'East Coast expert', edge grip 8, damp 9
Reviewer says 'love this on the ice coast', edge grip 8, camber
Reviewer mentions 'East Coast edge grip', damp 7, edge grip 8

queries.query_text: a confidence-inspiring ski for someone who skis fast but wants to feel safe
queries.notes: Balancing high-speed stability with some forgiveness. Not a race ski (too unforgiving) but needs to handle speed.

ground_truth_top5.reason: Stability 8, damp 8, forgiveness 4 — strong but not punishing, 'confidence' in reviews
Stability 9, damp 9 — maximum composure but forgiveness only 3, expert-only
Stability 8, damp 8 — 'confidence-inspiring' in reviews, reasonable forgiveness
Stability 9, damp 9, forgiveness 3 — clinical but demanding
Stability 7, damp 7, forgiveness 5 — safe feeling, moderate speed capability

queries.query_text: cushioned long-distance running shoe for marathon training
queries.notes: Tests domain adaptation — system must switch from ski domain to running shoe domain

ground_truth_top5.reason: Cushioned but more for daily training
Some cushion but not primary purpose

queries.query_text: lightweight responsive trail running shoe with good grip
queries.notes: Tests domain adaptation with a trail running query
